# Enumerating the Decision Space

`forkflow::spec_grid()` takes the Cartesian product of named choices, and
`adjuster_sets()` returns every subset of a covariate pool.

```r
library(forkflow)

spec_grid(
  adjust_age = c(TRUE, FALSE),
  transform  = c("identity", "log"),
  missing    = c("complete", "impute")
)

adjuster_sets(c("age", "sex", "bmi"))
```

Each row is one complete, defensible specification. Adding a choice is one more
argument, and the grid grows on its own.
